Package global.thalion.ttio

Class Query

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.Query
public final class Query extends Object
Compressed-domain query over a SpectrumIndex. Predicates combine with AND (intersection).

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOQuery, Python ttio.query.Query.

Since:
0.6
